cards.rules_text:
[i]Roll — [/i]Fish can't be blocked if you have less then three cards in hand.
[i]More Ammo — [/i]Whenever Fish deals combat damage to a player, draw a card, then discard a card unless you have three or less cards in hand.

[i]Inaccurate — [/i]Steroids must attack each combat. 
[i]Dual Wielding — [/i]Each Equipment attached to Steroids has an additional instance of each of its abilities.

Vigilance
[i]Heat [/i]— Whenever Rogue attacks, target opponent creates a 1/1 tapped white Human Soldier creature token.
[i]Blast Armor[/i] — When Rogue dies, she deals 2 damage to each creature. Until end of turn, if a creature dealt damage this way would die, exile it.

Deathtouch
[i]More Mutation —[/i]When Horror enters, you get two rad counters.
[i]Radiation Beam [/i]— When Horror attacks, you may exile a card in your graveyard put there from anywhere this turn. Create a copy of it. You may cast the copy. When you do, each player gets rad counters equal to its mana value.

Vigilance
[i]Sees In The Dark[/i] — Whenever you attack or are attacked, surveil 1. [i](Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)[/i]
[i]Telekinesis —[/i] {T}: Target creature attacks this turn if able. When it deals combat damage to a player this turn, draw two cards, then discard a card.
Whenever a player is dealt damage, they get that many rad counters.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“Gun smoke in the air / Friend weeping in pain / Blood pools everywhere / It's pouring acid rain / Our homes destroyed / Wishing this to end.”[/i]

cards.rules_text:
[i]Can Spawn Allies [/i]— When this creature enters, create twice X 2/2 black Mutant Survivor tokens with decayed. You lose X life. [i](It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)[/i]
[i]Portals Heal[/i] — Whenever a land you control enters, up to one target creature gains lifelink until end of turn.

[i]Fire Faster [/i]— Haste
[i]Pop Pop![/i] — Whenever you cast a Equipment spell or cast a spell during combat, you may discard a card. When you do, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for it.

Flash
[i]More Health [/i]— Crystal enters with a shield counter. [i](If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)[/i]
[i]Shield [/i]— Unblocked creatures attacking you have no abilities.

Trample
[i]Throw Weapon — [/i]Whenever Chicken attacks, if she's equipped, she deals 2 damage to each opponent. 
[i]Hard to Kill[/i] — When Chicken dies, if she's dealt damage to a player this turn, create a token copy of her.

[i]Faster[/i] — You may play an additional land as long as Plant entered this turn.
[i]Snare [/i]— {3}: Put a +1/+1 counter on Plant. It must be blocked this turn if able.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Plant can hold RMB to see further.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Decayed [i](This creature can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)[/i]

Whenever Melting enters or attacks, mill two cards.
[i]Corpse Explosion —[/i]Whenever Melting attacks, you may exile a creature card from a graveyard. If you do, each player loses 2 life.
You may reveal a legendary card you own from outside the game and put it into your hand. Exile Epic Encounter.

Indestructible
When the Nuclear Throne enters or attacks, it deals 10 damage to up to one nonplayer target. Each player gets rad counters equal to the excess damage dealt this way. 
At the beginning of your upkeep, if there are twenty or more cards in graveyards, the Nuclear Throne becomes a creature.

Whenever a creature you control enters, you may exile an Aura card you control from outside the game. You may cast it without paying its mana cost if it has mana value equal to or less than that creature. Otherwise, put it into your hand.

Each player may shuffle their hand and graveyard into their library, then draw seven cards. Each player who did may put a permanent card from their hand onto the battlefield. 
Exile Loop.

When Throne II enters, it deals 4 damage to each other creature.
Whenever a permanent card is put into a graveyard, each player gets a rad counter.
{20}: Shuffle your hand and graveyard into your library, then draw seven cards. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each card in your graveyard. Activate only as a sorcery.

Whenever a opponent casts a spell, put +1/+1 counters on Lil Hunter equal to that spell's mana value unless that spell's controller has Lil Hunter deal that much damage to them.
When Lil Hunter dies, he deals damage to each opponent equal to his power.

Vigilance, first strike
When Captain enters, exile up to one target creature.
Whenever Captain deals combat damage to a player, create three 1/1 white Human Soldier tokens.

cards.type: Legendary Creature — Mutant Dog Dog Dog
cards.rules_text:
Big Dog enters tapped with three stun counters on him.
Whenever Big Dog attacks, create two 2/2 tapped and attacking red Missile artifact creature tokens. 
Whenever a nontoken creature dies, untap Big Dog.

[i]Arsenal — [/i]Whenever a nontoken Equipment you control enters, create a token copy of it, except the token loses all equip abilities and has “Equip Gamer {1}”.[i]
Cry [/i]— Whenever a creature blocks Yung Cuz, put two stun counters on that creature. That creature loses all abilities until it untaps.
